abstract: This document briefly summarizes the results of the national Technology Transfer and Research Planning Meetings which were held between July and November 1993 in 9 of the 10 SADC countries. Each national report was prepared by one of the SMIP scientists attending each meeting and highlights of particular national meetings are included
institution: SADC/ICRISAT Sorghum and Millet Improvement Program Southern Africa Development Community International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
corp_creators: SADC/ICRISAT Sorghum and Millet Improvement Program Southern Africa Development Community International Crops Research Institute for the Semi-Arid Tropics
keywords: Sorghum bicolor; Pennisetum americanum; Technology transfer; Agricultural research; Planning; Southern Africa; Botswana; Lesotho; Malawi; Mozambique; Namibia; Swaziland;Tanzania; Zambia; Zimbabwe; Conferences, RP8977
title: Sorghum and pearl millet technology transfer and research planning meetings, 1993/94
